text.title: Agency Annual Plan Template Core Rules

rule.statement: The plan MUST fit on one page (≤ 600 words); plans exceeding are rejected.
rule.rationale: One-page artefacts get re-read; multi-page plans get filed and forgotten.

rule.statement: Plan MUST list quarterly revenue targets with revenue-line split (project / retainer / productised); aggregate-only plans rejected.
rule.rationale: Aggregate hides mix shifts; mix is the leading agency indicator.

rule.statement: Each milestone MUST have a named owner; team-as-owner is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Team-owned milestones drift; named humans deliver.

rule.statement: Each investment line MUST have a budget cap and expected-return statement; uncapped investments are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Uncapped investment kills cash flow in a micro-agency.

rule.statement: Plan MUST be reviewed at quarterly checkpoint with variance + reason + corrective action; checkpoints can move plan targets only with sponsor approval.
rule.rationale: Plan without review becomes wallpaper; sponsor-only retargeting prevents goal-skew.
